steps.title: Spot the shift from general to specific
steps.content: The first sentence describes the researchers' general aim: to analyze “diet composition”. The second sentence then specifies what that analysis entailed: the ratio of “three plant subtypes”. The transition must signal this narrowing from broader claim to particular detail.

steps.title: Apply the specification signal
steps.content:
Specifically directly indicates that what follows is a particular instance or detail elaborating the preceding general statement.

A, B, and C each introduce unrelated logical relationships—contrast, equivalence, and causation—that don't fit this narrowing.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
